name: Hors D'oeuvre Pigs-in-Blankets
recipeIngredient: 1 sheet (1/2 pound) frozen puff pastry, available in most major supermarkets
orange-mustard glaze variation: 1/2 cup orange juice, 2 tablespoons sherry, 2 tablespoons brown sugar, 1 tablespoon spicy brown mustard
spicy cheese variation: grated parmesan, cayenne
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the puff pastry according to package directions.
2. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
3. Rinse and pat the frankfurters dry. In a small bowl, lightly beat together the eggs.
4. On a lightly floured surface, roll out the puff pastry to a rectangle measuring 12 by 10 inches and 1/8 inch thick. With a sharp knife or pizza cutter, cut the rectangle into twelve 2 by 5-inch rectangles. Then cut each rectangle in half on the diagonal to form 24 triangles.
5. Variation 1: Place a frankfurter at the base of a triangle of puff pastry and roll up. Brush each roll-up with the egg wash and sprinkle with sesame, caraway, poppy, or cumin seeds or dried onion flakes.
6. Variation 2: To make the glaze, in a small saucepan combine the orange juice, sherry, and brown sugar and bring to a simmer. Cook the glaze until slightly thickened. Stir in the mustard and remove from heat. Brush each puff pastry triangle with the glaze before rolling up around the frankfurter. Place on a baking sheet.
7. Variation 3: Before separating the puff pastry into the individual triangles, sprinkle with grated Parmesan and cayenne. Gently press the cheese into the puff pastry and then roll up a triangle around each frankfurter. Brush each roll-up with the egg wash and sprinkle with grated Parmesan and a little cayenne.
8. Bake the roll-ups for 12 to 15 minutes or until puffed and golden brown. Serve immediately.
Yield: 24 hors d'oeuvres
